name: Menthol
description: Menthol is a monoterpene alcohol from mint oils that activates TRPM8 cold receptors and is used in topical cooling and GI antispasmodic products.
interactions: May have additive sedative effects with other CNS depressants in sensitive users.
summary: Menthol is a monoterpene alcohol from mint oils that activates TRPM8 cold receptors and is used in topical cooling and GI antispasmodic products.
mechanism: Agonist of TRPM8, driving cooling sensation and core sensory pharmacology.
